category_sources: Official CUE docs describe CUE as an open-source data validation language for data, schema, and policy constraints.
source_facts.description says CUE validates and defines text-based and dynamic configuration.
display_name_sources: Official CUE documentation and GitHub repository use the display name CUE.
docs_sources: Official CUE documentation site is the dedicated docs surface.
Official CUE language specification is the reference documentation.
Official GitHub README points to cuelang.org documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/cue-lang/cue; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official CUE docs describe CUE as a data validation language for configuration, schema, and policy constraints.
source_facts.description identifies configuration validation and definition.
